name: nidra-activity-capture
description: Nidra — an ambient activity-capture WebExtension (Chrome + iOS Safari) that records what you read/search/do and forms opinions about you.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/unit/*.test.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/*.test.mjs
scripts.ios: xcrun safari-web-extension-converter ./extension --project-location ./ios --app-name Nidra --bundle-identifier in.aadhaa.nidra --swift --ios-only --copy-resources --no-open --no-prompt --force && sed -i '' 's/in\.aadhaa\.Nidra/in.aadhaa.nidra/g' ios/Nidra/Nidra.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj
